data.name: ResourceYamlViewer_DryRunSucceededMessage
data.value: The server accepted the manifest using dry-run.

data.name: ResourceListViewModel_Delete_Content
data.value: This will delete {0} items. Are you sure?

data.name: VisualizationView_HideNoiseTooltip
data.value: Hide noisy resources like inactive Replica Sets

data.name: PortForwarderListViewModel_Remove_Content
data.value: Remove the Port Forward for {0}/{1}:{2}? Are you sure?

data.name: SettingsView_Logging_ToolTip
data.value: KubeUI logs to the local file system in the <User Profile>/.kubeui/app.log

data.name: SettingsView_Telemetry_ToolTip
data.value: KubeUI gathers telemetry data to help the team improve the product.

data.name: SettingsView_PreRelease_ToolTip
data.value: Allows updates to pre-release versions of KubeUI

data.name: Cluster_Missing_Namespace_Permission_Content
data.value: Your account does not have the necessary permissions to list or watch namespaces. Please enter the names of the namespaces this account should have access to in the Settings window, and then reconnect

data.name: ResourceListViewModel_Restart_Content
data.value: This will restart {0} Resources. Are you sure?
